_description: No active broadcast. Either hasn't started yet, or streamer has cut. videoUID and hlsUrl are both null — the server does NOT return last-known values.
_server_must: videoUID must be null, hlsUrl must be null. errorCode may be null or may be present if the stream went idle due to a Cloudflare error (e.g. ERR_STORAGE_QUOTA_EXHAUSTED). ETag changes from the last non-idle state.
